title: bursera morelensis
intro: Bursera morelensis, also known as 'Oreganillo', is a small tree native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Burseraceae. This plant has been utilized for centuries in traditional medicine, attributed to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bursera morelensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Bursera morelensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves, roots, or bark, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or poultices.
